title: NIO Inc Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Deliveries Amidst Revenue Challenges
text: NIO achieved record quarterly deliveries of 61,855 vehicles in Q3 2024, maintaining position as leading EV brand in China's premium segment above RMB300,000 with 48% market share. Total revenues reached RMB18.7 billion (down 2.1% year-over-year, up 7% quarter-over-quarter). Vehicle sales reached RMB16.7 billion (down 4.1% annually, up 6.5% sequentially). Net loss reached RMB5.1 billion (up 11% year-over-year). Cash reserves totaled RMB42.2 billion. Vehicle margin expanded to 13.1% versus 11% in Q3 2023. Overall gross margin climbed to 10.7% from 8% year-over-year. ONVO brand launched L60 targeting mainstream families but production ramp-up slower than anticipated, with targets set for 10,000 monthly units by December and 20,000 by March. CEO Bin Li stated management aims for 15% vehicle margin in Q4 with long-term goal of 20% by 2025. Revenue declined primarily through lower average selling prices while operating losses increased 8.1% annually.
